candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label; preferred for revenue priority list.
Also a valid top-line sales label; values match Total Revenue and may be used if label changes across years.

variables.notes: Both are valid revenue labels with identical values; ordered with explicit total revenue first.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears as primary cost line below revenue.

variables.notes: Chosen as the direct cost / cost of sales equivalent.

candidates.why: Operating overhead personnel cost component; appropriate SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component excluding D&A and finance items.
Balance sheet asset line, not an income statement operating expense; not suitable for SG&A expense mapping.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization supplemental line, but below operating profit and amortization should be excluded from SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead components and excluded COGS, depreciation/amortization, impairment, and finance items. Did not include R&D because only R&D-related line is supplemental amortization below operating profit.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Only R&D-related income statement line available, but it is amortization supplemental and appears below operating profit, so not a clean R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset line, not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: No dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line exists. Mapped to the only R&D-related income statement line available, which is below EBIT and therefore not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense line.
Finance cost but not specifically interest; fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component related to leases; useful fallback if primary line missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; lower priority than main line.
Broader finance expense total, acceptable only if specific interest lines unavailable.
Balancing line, not a real expense item.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific interest expense first, then lease interest, then broader finance expense total as fallback. Excluded balancing and supplemental duplicate rows.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests.
This is minority interest, not parent book equity.
Total equity includes non-controlling interest, so only fallback if parent equity unavailable.
Balancing item, not a substantive equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Entire balance sheet total, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent equity line first to exclude NCI; total equity added only as fallback if label changes.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings to NCI, not balance sheet minority equity; not preferred for MIB.
Best balance sheet non-controlling interest line.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels only, with the more explicit non-controlling interest line first.
